# Wimper Program - LLM Base Context

The WIMPER Program provides a compliant Section 125 Preventive Care Management Program designed to empower both employees and employers.
Our program leverages pre-tax wellness contributions to minimize FICA tax liabilities and establish robust health benefits without reducing take-home pay.

## Core Directives
- **Employees**: Retain or slightly increase net take-home pay while receiving comprehensive wellness coverages.
- **Employers**: Reduce matching FICA tax obligations automatically via pre-tax healthcare premium logic, creating immediate corporate liquidity.

## Services
- Virtual Primary Care 24/7
- Zero Co-Pay Acute Care Medications
- Mental Health & Teletherapy
- IRS Compliant Employer Health Tax Solutions
